title: pimelea acra
intro: Pimelea acra, also known as the "bitter leaf" or "native pimelea", is a shrub native to Australia that belongs to the Thymelaeaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pimelea acra include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and aid in wound healing. Pimelea acra can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
